This suspect was charged with aggravated assault, failure to respond to an officer's signal to stop, three counts of possession of a controlled substance, use or possession of drug paraphernalia, two counts of interfering with a peace officer, driving with a measurable controlled substance, failure to comply at a vehicle accident or property damage, and reckless driving. Court records indicate she pleaded guilty to third-degree felony charges of property damage with a loss greater than $5,000, failure to respond to an officer's signal to stop, reckless endangerment, and driving with a measurable controlled substance. The rest of the charges were dismissed. On July 16th, 2025, she was sentenced to an indeterminate term of not to exceed five years in the Utah State Prison for her felony charges. However, the prison term was suspended. She was also ordered to be placed in the Utah County Jail for 15 months, but will only serve a year.
